title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition

claims.text: Residual learning eases training of substantially deeper networks and yields accuracy gains from increased depth.
claims.source_text: We present a residual learning framework to ease the training of networks that are substantially deeper than those used previously.

methods.name: Residual Block
methods.source_text: we explicitly reformulate the layers as learning residual functions with reference to the layer inputs

relations.explanation: Deeper residual nets outperform VGG on ImageNet with lower complexity.

evidence.text: Our residual nets are deeper, yet have lower complexity
